iterations.theme: The Journey of Rooted: Building a Mental Health App Organically from Personal Experience to 2 Million Downloads
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire podcast, which falls within the 35-45 minute length requirement, and concludes with the podcast's outro.
